ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "driver_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "driver_number" INTEGER /* Driver number assigned to the driver */,
  "driver_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driver_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "driver_height" TEXT /* Height of the driver in meters */,
  "driver_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the driver in kilograms */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "driver_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the driver joined the league */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "driver_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the team */,
  "team_founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Current status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the team */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_sponsorship_amount" TEXT /* Total sponsorship amount received by the team */,
  "team_home_track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home track of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_home_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_home_track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "owner_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "owner_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the owner */,
  "owner_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the owner */,
  "owner_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the owner joined the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_founded_date" TEXT /* Date the sponsor was founded */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person at the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_sponsorship_amount" TEXT /* Total sponsorship amount provided by the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "series_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "series_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  "series_number_of_races" INTEGER /* Number of races in the series */,
  "series_prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize pool for the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the race was held */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "race_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "race_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  "race_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "race_track_status" TEXT /* Status of the track (e.g., dry, wet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the track */,
  "track_length" TEXT /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  "track_width" TEXT /* Width of the track in meters */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track (e.g., oval, road course) */,
  "track_capacity" INTEGER /* Spectator capacity of the track */,
  "track_surface" TEXT /* Surface of the track (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Position finished by the driver */,
  "starting_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the driver */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver */,
  "race_result_time" TEXT /* Time taken to finish the race */,
  "race_result_laps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of laps completed by the driver */,
  "race_result_best_lap_time" TEXT /* Best lap time by the driver */,
  "race_result_pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops made by the driver */,
  "race_result_fuel_consumption" TEXT /* Fuel consumption during the race */,
  "race_result_tire_changes" INTEGER /* Number of tire changes made by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the standings */,
  "standing_season" INTEGER /* Season for which the standing is recorded */,
  "standing_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series for which the standing is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_standing_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("standing_series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_standings" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff standing */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "playoff_points_earned" INTEGER /* Playoff points earned by the driver */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the driver in the playoff standings */,
  "playoff_season" INTEGER /* Season for which the playoff standing is recorded */,
  "playoff_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series for which the playoff standing is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_standings_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_standings_playoff_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("playoff_series_id") REFERENCES series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "penalty_points" INTEGER /* Penalty points incurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty */,
  "penalty_date" TEXT /* Date the penalty was incurred */,
  "penalty_race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race during which the penalty was incurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_penalty_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("penalty_race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "top_5" INTEGER /* Number of top 5 finishes */,
  "top_10" INTEGER /* Number of top 10 finishes */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "driver_season_average_position" TEXT /* Average finishing position of the driver in the season */,
  "driver_season_fastest_laps" INTEGER /* Number of fastest laps by the driver in the season */,
  "driver_season_poles" INTEGER /* Number of pole positions by the driver in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "top_5" INTEGER /* Number of top 5 finishes */,
  "top_10" INTEGER /* Number of top 10 finishes */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "team_season_average_position" TEXT /* Average finishing position of the team in the season */,
  "team_season_fastest_laps" INTEGER /* Number of fastest laps by the team in the season */,
  "team_season_poles" INTEGER /* Number of pole positions by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_sponsors" (
  "team_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-sponsor relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" TEXT /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsors_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)
